---
title: "EasyDE Walkthrough — 05 Final DESeq2"
output: html_document
---

# Step 05: Final DESeq2 with W Factors

> **Paired mode:** This step is automatically **skipped** — the base model
> from step 03 is the final result.

For unpaired analyses, this step re-fits DESeq2 with W latent factors from
step 04 added to the formula. W factors that correlated with the contrast
variable were already pruned in step 04.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
pipeline_root <- normalizePath("../..")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = pipeline_root)
setwd(pipeline_root)
config_path <- "config/config_treatments.yaml"   # EDIT THIS
```

## Check if this step should run

```{r check-mode}
cfg <- suppressWarnings(yaml::read_yaml(config_path))
paired <- isTRUE(cfg$steps$paired_analysis)

if (paired) {
    cat("** PAIRED MODE — this entire notebook is SKIPPED **\n")
    cat("** Step 03 base model IS the final model **\n")
    knitr::knit_exit()
}
```

## Source and run

```{r source-script}
source("workflow/scripts/05_run_deseq_final.R")
```

```{r build-loop}
config_data <- load_config(config_path)
contrasts_df <- config_data$contrasts_df

loop_table <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(contrasts_df)), function(i) {
    row <- contrasts_df[i, ]
    strata <- parse_pipe_field(row$strata)
    data.frame(contrast_id = row$contrast_id, stratum = strata,
               stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}))
```

```{r run-loop}
for (i in seq_len(nrow(loop_table))) {
    cid <- loop_table$contrast_id[i]
    stm <- loop_table$stratum[i]
    cat(sprintf("\n=== [%d/%d] %s | %s ===\n", i, nrow(loop_table), cid, stm))

    tryCatch(
        main(config_path, cid, stm),
        error = function(e) cat(sprintf("  [ERROR] %s\n", e$message))
    )
}
```
